scripts.lint:seo: npm run lint -- scripts/seo lib/__tests__/seo-policy.test.ts lib/__tests__/schema.test.ts
scripts.seo:check:data-contracts: npm run seo:check:production-ingestion -- --indexed scripts/analytics/fixtures/production/search-console-indexed.weekly.sample.csv --traffic scripts/analytics/fixtures/production/search-console-traffic.weekly.sample.csv --booked-events scripts/analytics/fixtures/production/booked-call-events.weekly.sample.ndjson && npm run seo:check:ga4 -- --input scripts/analytics/fixtures/ga4/ga4-events.weekly.sample.csv
scripts.seo:check:all: npm run seo:check && npm run seo:check-schema && npm run seo:check-links && npm run seo:check-clusters && npm run seo:check-messaging && npm run seo:check-attribution && npm run seo:check:data-contracts
